title: Choreb #2722
definition:
Horeb = "desert"

 1) another name for Mount Sinai from which God gave the law to Moses
    and the Israelites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Horeb = "desert"

 1) another name for Mount Sinai from which God gave the law to Moses
    and the Israelites

    NASB:  waste, a mountain in Sinai
